description: Style NoteA practical and stylish solution to managing your monetary essentials, this wallet from fiorelli is the perfect accessory for all your outfits. Handcrafted from premium leather, this piece is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that it will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style.nbsp; Product DetailsRed two fold wallet with press button closure Self binding with metal brand badge on the frontFive credit card slots, a photo id card holder with one slip pocket on one sideSix credit card slots, one zippered and two main compartments in the centre foldCard holder side can be buttoned to the centre foldZippered compartment at backGuarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 19 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
